title: Set 3: The New Software 💻
instructions_en: READ THE STORY. CHOOSE A WORD FROM THE BOX. WRITE THE CORRECT WORD NEXT TO NUMBERS 1–5. THERE IS ONE EXAMPLE.
story_segments: My father works as an IT specialist in a large office. Last week, he brought home a new

that he helped to design. He said it was for people who want to learn how to build their own websites. I was very excited to try it on my laptop.

When I opened the program, a friendly robot appeared on the
to explain what to do. I had to type my name using the
and then choose a color for my site. At first, I had a
because the colors didn't look right, but I read the instructions again very

.

After an hour, I finished my first page! It had a lot of
about my favorite hobbies. My dad couldn't believe how fast I learned. He said that maybe one day I will become a famous programmer just like him.

title_question.prompt: Now choose the best name for the story. Write a letter:

explanations_vi: Một robot thân thiện xuất hiện trên màn hình (screen) để giải thích cách làm.
Tôi phải gõ tên mình bằng bàn phím (keyboard).
Lúc đầu, tôi gặp một vấn đề/lỗi (problem) vì màu sắc trông không đúng.
Tôi đã đọc lại hướng dẫn một cách cẩn thận (carefully).
Trang web có rất nhiều thông tin (information) về sở thích của tôi.
Tiêu đề B (Học lập trình ở nhà) là đúng nhất vì kể về việc tác giả dùng phần mềm mới để tự tạo trang web.
